The '''RCS-1''' was a [[Flight computer/Legends|flight control computer]] designed by [[Miradyne Limited]]. It was installed on the standard models of the [[Starfeld Industries/Legends|Starfeld Industries]] [[Z-10 Seeker-class scout ship|Z-10 Seeker]].<ref name="BG" />

The RCS-1 (like all RCS systems) was notoriously difficult to modify due to a rigid set of inter-connectivity protocols. Non-standard personal modifications often failed to work. The problem was exacerbated by Miradyne's bankruptcy. Since replacement parts became extremely hard to come by, any breakdown in the RCS-1 system had the potential to be catastrophic.<ref name="BG" />
